notes: All CWV thresholds match Google's official definitions (measured at p75 of field data). INP replaced FID as the official responsiveness CWV in March 2024. LCP/CLS/INP are the three confirmed ranking signals. FCP and TTFB are diagnostic only — not direct ranking factors, but leading indicators of LCP issues. Title 60-char limit is based on Google's ~580px pixel budget (renders differently per device but 60 chars is a safe universal target). Description 160-char limit is a CTR best practice; Google may rewrite descriptions anyway but having one prevents auto-generation from random body text. To update this file: research current Google CWV thresholds at web.dev/articles/vitals and update the numeric values. The notes field should explain what changed and why.
